query: What is the most recent NIFC National Fire News year-to-date acres burned figure for 2026, latest available as of late June 2026? Report the exact YTD acres and date.
answer:
I've completed the research. Here's the summary:

## Answer

The most recent NIFC year-to-date acres burned figure available **as of late June 2026** was:

**3,138,394 acres burned** — reported in the NIFC **Incident Management Situation Report (IMSR) dated Tuesday, June 30, 2026 (0730 MDT)**, reflecting cumulative activity through June 29, 2026. That report also showed **35,884 year-to-date wildfires**.

### Key supporting details
- The June 30 figure was **159% of the 10-year (2016–2025) average** for acres burned, at National Preparedness Level 4.
- **Cross-check:** The NIFC public "Statistics" dashboard, *Last Updated July 1, 2026 – 08:36*, showed a slightly higher **3,168,102 YTD acres / 36,262 fires** (reflecting the next reporting cycle plus minor revisions).

So depending on which NIFC data vintage the caller wants for "late June 2026":
- **IMSR of June 30, 2026: 3,138,394 acres** (the cleanest end-of-June source), or
- **NIFC dashboard as of July 1, 2026: 3,168,102 acres**.

I verified the June 30 figure directly from the source IMSR PDF and cross-validated with the NIFC statistics page. I also captured the trajectory (2.59M acres on June 7 → 3.14M on June 30 → 3.37M on the live July 7 dashboard) and noted NIFC's standard caveat that YTD figures are subject to revision due to SIT-209 reporting lags. Full structured findings with all data points and sources have been submitted.

sources.title: National Fire News | National Interagency Fire Center
sources.snippet: National Preparedness Level 4 as of June 29, 2026. So far this year, 37,209 fires have burned more than 3.3 million acres (July 6 narrative).

sources.title: Incident Management Situation Report Monday July 6 / Tuesday July 7, 2026
sources.snippet: July 6 IMSR YTD TOTAL FIRES 37,209; TOTAL ACRES 3,330,901.

key_facts: NIFC IMSR for Tuesday June 30, 2026 (0730 MDT) reported 3,138,394 year-to-date acres burned and 35,884 year-to-date wildfires nationally.
This is the latest YTD acres figure available as of late June 2026, current through June 29, 2026.
The June 30, 2026 YTD acres were 159% of the 10-year (2016-2025) average (avg = 1,977,688 acres); YTD fires were 133% of the 10-year average (avg = 27,042 fires).
The NIFC public Statistics dashboard, last updated July 1, 2026 08:36, showed 3,168,102 YTD acres burned and 36,262 YTD wildfires.
National Preparedness Level was 4 as of the June 30, 2026 IMSR.
By-agency YTD acres on June 30: ST/OT (state/other) 2,332,915; USFS 395,780; BLM 230,533; BIA 106,401; NPS 52,452; FWS 20,312.
Trajectory context: YTD acres were 2,585,366 (June 7 IMSR), 3,138,394 (June 30 IMSR), 3,330,901 (July 6 IMSR), and 3,369,628 on the live dashboard updated July 7, 2026.
NIFC caveat: YTD statistics can be revised up or down due to SIT-209 Application reporting lags and more accurate mapping/reporting adjustments.

data_points.metric: Year-to-date acres burned (June 7 IMSR, trajectory reference)
